frontmatter.title: Fibbozle
frontmatter.description: A console game in C, like 2048 but the tiles merge along the Fibonacci series instead of doubling. My first proper terminal project in C.
frontmatter.bannercaption: 2048, but the tiles climb the Fibonacci series
